name: @kjadeja/open-featurebase-mcp
description: Reverse-engineered MCP server for any public Featurebase feedback board — read-only access (list, search, stats, comments, stalled promises) without an API key or Pro plan.

scripts.test: node tests/unit/aggregation.test.mjs && node tests/unit/validation-format.test.mjs && node tests/unit/server-construction.test.mjs && node tests/unit/sdk-version.test.mjs && node tests/unit/client-cold-cache.test.mjs && node tests/unit/client-partial-fetch.test.mjs && node tests/unit/inspect-schemas.test.mjs && node tests/unit/server-validation.test.mjs && node tests/unit/server-cache-isolation.test.mjs && node tests/unit/lazy-enrichment.test.mjs && node tests/unit/role-classification.test.mjs && node tests/unit/atomic-pagination.test.mjs && node tests/unit/same-client-recovery.test.mjs && node tests/unit/zero-comment-enrichment.test.mjs

author: K-Jadeja
